title: Roasted Citrus and Chestnut Burrito
description: A flavorful burrito filled with roasted vegetables, citrus, and chestnuts. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Roast the chestnuts in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 10-15 minutes, or until tender.
In a pan, heat the citrus juice over medium heat.
Add the roasted vegetables and chestnuts to the pan, and stir to combine.
Add the Mexican rice to the pan, and stir to combine.
Warm the tortilla in the pan for 1-2 minutes, or until pliable.
Assemble the burrito by adding the filling to the tortilla, and topping with cheese and salsa.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped cilantro.
